title: Software Update - DFU - Turn off the device before starting DFU
scenario: Device Firmware Update fails with "Update currently not available" popup when device is turned off before starting the update
steps: 1. Pair and connect a Poly Bluetooth audio device that has an available firmware update.
2. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app.
3. Navigate to Home → [Device Name] → Device Settings → Software Update.
5. Turn off the device (e.g., press and hold the Power button until the device powers down).
expected: 1. After turning off the device, nothing happens — the app remains on the "Software Update" screen. 2. After tapping Continue and Start Update, a popup appears with the message "Update currently not available, please try back later". 3. Tapping OK closes the popup and returns the user to the "Three Easy Steps" screen.
